name: Region Hovedstaden (Capital Region of Denmark)

colors.symbolism: the deep blue of the Region Hovedstaden corporate identity
the regional logo motif and wordmark

description: A deep navy-blue field charged at the centre with a white symbol and the wordmark 'Region Hovedstaden'.
history: Region Hovedstaden was established on 1 January 2007 by the Danish Local Government Reform (Strukturreformen). The flag uses the region's corporate visual identity in white on a deep blue field.

features.symbolism: the deep blue identifying the Capital Region's corporate identity
the official mark and wordmark of Region Hovedstaden (the Capital Region of Denmark), one of the five regions established in the 2007 local-government reform
